name: Broccoli Rabe
recipeIngredient: 2 lb Broccoli rabe, washed and finely chopped
1 large Onion, finely chopped (large stems removed)
recipeInstructions:
1. Sauté the garlic and onion in olive oil until softened.
2. Add the broccoli rabe to the pan and sauté for 2-3 minutes.
3. Cover and steam for an additional 4-5 minutes, or until tender.
